C

calculateDeltas() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.ObjectiveCard
This method is implemented in the PatternObjectiveCard class in order to take advantage of the override.
calculateDeltas() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.PatternObjectiveCard
method that calculates the delta attributes for this PatternObjectiveCard object
calculateEndgamePoints() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.Match
It calculates for every player the points won by achieving the objectives: the 2 public objectives shared in all the match and, for each player, their secret one.
calculateObjPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.Player
Calculate the points scored with the player's secret objective
calculateObjPoints(ObjectiveCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.Player
Calculate the points scored with an objective card
calculatePoints(PlayingGrid) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.ElementsObjectiveCard
override of the calculatePoints method: this method calculates the final points to be assigned to a player, given the number of completions of a ElementsObjectiveCard
calculatePoints(PlayingGrid) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.ObjectiveCard
This method is implemented in PatternObjectiveCard and ElementObjectiveCard classes, in order to take advantage of the override.
calculatePoints(PlayingGrid) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.PatternObjectiveCard
Override of the calculatePoints method: this method calculates the final points to be assigned to a player, given the number of completions of a PatternObjectiveCard

This class defines the messages with the client request to close its match and server connection if it's connected by sockets

Constructor method for a CloseMatchMessage
closeMatchForAllPlayers(String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Server
Closes the match for all players in a game, notifying them of the termination
closeMatchForPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Server
Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
closeMatchForPlayer(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am12.ServerStub
Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
